arrow.description: small sharp filled triangle at axis tips

label_placement.function_label_position: near curve end, offset perpendicular to curve, not overlapping
label_placement.point_label_position: immediately adjacent to dot, upper-right preferred
label_placement.x_label_position: right end of x-axis, slightly below
label_placement.number_on_axis: on axis tick marks, outside the graph area

geometry_style.polygon_style: thin black lines connecting labeled vertices

overall.margin: minimal, axes extend slightly beyond data
overall.impression: clean, precise, professional, and consistent scientific/technical aesthetic
